title: The Strange Giants of Bodie

scenes.text: A ghost town full of giants: is Bodie hiding secrets?
The ghost town of Bodie is located in California, once a bustling gold mining hub.
Bodie is preserved in a state of arrested decay, giving it an eerie atmosphere.
Visitors claim to see ghostly figures among the ruins.
scenes.label: GHOSTLY SIGHTINGS

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Bodie, USA - Unknown. Once a bustling gold mining town, Bodie is now ghostly and abandoned, where visitors report strange sightings. Discover the secrets it might hold. Follow for daily mysteries!
